message:
Fix import type resolution, module allocator detection, unused vars

- imports.zig: Use resolveImportSource() to find .py source for type
  registration even when .so exists
- compile.zig: Fix source_file_dir to use actual input file directory
- allocator_analyzer.zig: Detect module function calls need allocator
- types.zig: Add isUnused() for semantic analysis
- assign.zig: Emit `_ = expr;` for unused assignments

Unit tests: 16 passed, 7 failed (was 14/9)
